---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for PolicyStack
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who would benefit and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have ideas about the API or config shape, sketch them out:

```ts
defineConfig({
	// proposed new field or behavior
});
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you'd prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, compliance requirements, or anything else relevant.
